I won't lie, I know I can do better than this (especially with Berdly and Spamton), but I spent too long recording and uploading it to NOT submit it. Mods may need to retime - LiveSplit was giving me issues and I decided to not use it rather than fight any issues that might've popped up during the run itself. Time entered is from me going back and rewatching the footage after, and it may be a second or two off.

Mod Note: Missing audio is permissible for a runner’s first three runs, however, please try to make sure game audio is present for future submissions.
Retimed to a 1:52:04.067

I restarted the timer at the start because I started it too early but it should stop and start at the right points (I left it going for a bit too long at the end but it's easy to tell when the last text box was). There was a space of time in the middle where the timer lagged behind since I minimized the tab on accident but it was still running behind the scenes and was able to reload on stream once I opened firefox (what the timer was on). Its also easy to prove the time is still correct by just the video time, thank you for your time!

VerifNote. Start at 3710, finish at 453158 at 60 fps : 2h04m50s
